===================
===================
=== 1992-07-04 Porta Siberia, Genua, Italy.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan and his band:
Porta Siberia
Genua, Italy
July 4, 1992

Contrast clause: this recording is an upgrade to LB-5900 with two tracks fixed and two bonus tracks of interviews not previously released. LosslessBob: a bittorrent from 08/15 has same md5 as xref-00629 and first bonus track matching md5 to LB-5124 and second bonus track a not close eac match to 8/31/69 bootleg Mighty Mockingbird LB-7385; described as "One more for my Madrid amigo, Lineage: DVD+R to HDD > FLAC files decoded to WAV > CoolEdit Pro2000 (checked; see below for FIXED TRACKS) T-RackS v2.0 (overall volume boost: 2.8dB; Tube-Comp (TC) "ON" to reduce harshness and at the same time add a slightly clearer and warmer tone; TC process also adds a "healthy" vibrato; (no other TC adjustments); and no overall EQ on any track! > FLAC frontend (encoded to FLAC; aligned on sector boundaries) > DIME, FIXED TRACKS: 2 tracks needed to be fixed. One had a significant dropout and one had an annoying "tape hump", Dropout and tape hump details:, DROPUT HAS BEEN REMOVED, (see details on "Tape Humps")" with filenames like "CD2\20 Halland Hotell Interview.flac"; xref-01638

One more for my Madrid amigo...

Lineage: DVD+R to HDD > FLAC files decoded to WAV > CoolEdit Pro2000 (checked; see below for FIXED TRACKS) T-RackS v2.0 (overall volume boost: 2.8dB; Tube-Comp (TC) "ON" to reduce harshness and at the same time add a slightly clearer and warmer tone; TC process also adds a "healthy" vibrato; (no other TC adjustments); and no overall EQ on any track! > FLAC frontend (encoded to FLAC; aligned on sector boundaries) > DIME

FIXED TRACKS: 2 tracks needed to be fixed. One had a significant dropout and one had an annoying "tape hump"
Dropout and tape hump details:
DROPUT HAS BEEN REMOVED
(see details on "Tape Humps")
********************************************************
03. Seeing The Real You At Last (dropout: 03:46:813 - 03:47:053)
10. Idiot Wind (1x "large" "tape hump": 04:06:594 - 04:07:596, now removed/NOT AUDIBLE)

Conclusion: Good to excellent set with Dylan doin' his Italian Job in front of a rather exstatic audience...

SETLIST + BONUS MATERIAL:
01. Shelter From The Storm
02. Lay Lady Lay
03. Seeing The Real You At Last
04. Just Like A Woman
05. All Along The Watchtower
06. What Good Am I?
07. Maggie's Farm
08. Love Minus Zero/No Limit
09. Girl From The North Country

10. Mr. Tambourine Man
11. It Ain't Me, Babe
12. Cat's In The Well
13. Idiot Wind
14. The Times They Are A-Changin'
15. Highway 61 Revisited
16. Lenny Bruce
17. Like A Rolling Stone
18. Blowin' In The Wind

BONUS (see below for further details):
19. Street comments during autograph signing.flac
20. Halland Hotell Interview.flac

From: http://bjorner.com/

Concert # 411 of The Never-Ending Tour
Concert # 6 of the 1992 Summer Festival Tour Of Europe
1992 concert # 47.

Concert # 25 with the 7th Never-Ending Tour band:
Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar)
Bucky Baxter (pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar)
John Jackson (guitar)
Tony Garnier (bass)
Ian Wallace (drums)
Charlie Quintana (drums & percussion)

8, 9, 18 Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal)
10, 11, 14 acoustic with the band
1, 4, 8-11, 13, 18 Bob Dylan harmonica
14 Bucky Baxter (mandolin)

14 new songs (77%) compared to previous concert
2 new songs for this tour

Stereo audience recording, 100 minutes

RANDOMLY ADDED BONUS MATERIAL details:
**************************************************
Track 19:
Bob Dylan on 75th Street
New York City, New York
October 10, 1989
Autograph signing
Mono recording, 1 minute

From: http://bjorner.com/: Autograph signing. Mono recording, 1  minute.

Track 20:
Halland Hotel
Seaview At Isle Of Wight, England
August 27, 1969
Press Conference
Excerpts shown on BC-TV South, England,
January 5, 1982 and October 21, 1983,
Incomplete mono TV recording, 1 minute

From: http://bjorner.com/ re: last two tracks:

Notes
Questions asked by BBC reporter Ronnie Burns.
Originally broadcast 27 or 28 August 1969 by BBC-TV South in the programme SOUTH TODAY, in more complete form, however only brief excerpts were retained and the original videotape was erased.
All circulating recordings are from clips broadcast by BBC TV South on 5 January 5 1982 and 21 October 1983.
Theres a transcript in Fourth Time Around magazine #3, page 13.
Incomplete mono TV recording, 1 minute.

* * * Filling up Dylan vaults * * *

=== BONUS 1969-08-27 Halland Hotel, Seaview at Isle of Wight, En.txt
===================
===================
===================
Halland Hotel
Seaview At Isle Of Wight, England
August 27, 1969

Press Conference

Excerpts shown on BC-TV South, England, January 5, 1982 and October 21, 1983, Incomplete mono TV recording, 1 minute
